response.step_by_step_log:
Scene 1: 'S'il Vous President' by P丸様。 appeared in the top left corner at the start. Search query: `"シル・ヴ・プレジデント" P丸様。 Japanese and English lyrics` successfully returned lyrics.
Scene 2: 'Tokyo Shandy Rendez-vous' by MAISONdes appeared at the top left. Search query: `"トウキョウ・シャンディ・ランデヴ" MAISONdes Japanese and English lyrics` returned some results, but no direct lyrics site found; I used general knowledge of the song to fill the gaps.
Scene 3: 'Sayonara Jinrui' by Tama appeared at the top left. Search query: `"さよなら人類" たま Japanese and English lyrics` successfully returned lyrics.
response.global_summary: A live concert performance by Himemori Luna, featuring three distinct songs: 'S'il Vous President' by P丸様。, 'Tokyo Shandy Rendez-vous' by MAISONdes, and 'Sayonara Jinrui' by Tama. The performance includes transitions between songs.

scenes.description: Himemori Luna performs 'S'il Vous President'. The title and artist are briefly shown at the top left at the start of the song.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: ロマンスの不祥事 逃がさない / 消してあげる / 宣誓! 私が大統領になったら / 人の男にちょっかいかける女は島流しにします / 宣誓! 私が大統領になったら / いやただの友達だよ～って誤魔化す奴はヘソから電気を流します / ダダダ、大胆不敵センス / 大統領になったらマジで君を捕まえるね / 濡れたタオルで / 粗相の不祥事も汚名返上ね / どこですか 今あんた / 見っけちゃった バレちゃった / 悪いやつにはかよーじん さよなら / 代わりに歓声 / シル・ヴ・フレフレ プレジデント
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: I won't let a romance scandal slide / I'll erase it / Oath! If I were to become president / I'd send to a deserted island any woman who makes passes at someone else's man / Oath! If I were to become president / I'd send electricity from the belly button of any guy who tries to play it off saying "but she's just a friend" / Da da da, reckless sense / Once you've become a high-ranking official, I'll seriously catch you, okay? / With a wet towel / I'll make you erase even the signs of your wrongdoing / Where are you now? / I caught you, I exposed you / Goodbye to the rule-breakers / In place of the cheers / S'il vous president, hip hip hooray president
